news.t: Top 4 ETFs to Track European Stocks in 2019

holdings.infoBox: FEUZ is an equity ETF with a total of 156 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prysmian stock at 1.47%, ArcelorMittal at 1.40%, Schaeffler AG at 1.38%, Aurubis AG at 1.33%, and Glanbia at 1.31%.

overview.description: The First Trust Eurozone AlphaDEX ETF (FEUZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq AlphaDex Eurozone index. The fund tracks an index of firms operating in the Eurozone, selected by growth and value factors and equal-weighted within tiers. FEUZ was launched on Oct 22, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
